servicesPreview.title: How can I help?
servicesPreview.subtitle: At this stage, the most important things are small, practical steps: better visibility, easier contact and first automations.

items.title: Local business website
items.desc: A simple, fast website with services, location, Google Maps, WhatsApp and a contact form.

items.title: Forms and bookings
items.desc: An enquiry or booking form that collects the key details and sends them in an organised way.

items.title: Google, WhatsApp and contact
items.desc: Improving the customer path: from finding the business on Google to contacting you easily from mobile.

items.title: Simple automations
items.desc: Connecting a form, email, spreadsheet or notifications so fewer things need to be done manually.

home.heading: Websites, forms and automations for small businesses in Spain
home.subheading: I help local businesses improve their online presence and customer contact through a clear website, Google, WhatsApp, forms and simple automations. The best first step is a short mini-audit of the website or Google profile.
home.localLine: Alicante · Santa Pola · Gran Alacant · Elche · PL / ES / EN

miniAudit.title: Let’s check whether your business gets enquiries easily online
miniAudit.description: Send me the link to your website or Google profile. I’ll review a few practical elements that influence customer trust and how easy it is to contact you.
checklist: Whether customers quickly understand what you offer
Whether it is easy to message on WhatsApp, call or send an enquiry
Whether the website works well on mobile
Whether the Google profile looks trustworthy
Whether services, location and languages are clear
Whether a simple form or online booking could help
miniAudit.note: The mini-audit is the first step: it helps identify which improvements make the most sense — website, Google profile, WhatsApp, form, online booking or a simple automation.

home.benefitsSubtitle: I focus on simple changes that help a small business look more trustworthy online and receive customer enquiries more easily.

benefits.title: More contacts from mobile
benefits.desc: Your website and Google profile should guide customers directly to a conversation, WhatsApp, phone call or form.

benefits.title: Better Google presence
benefits.desc: I help organise basic information, services, location and links so customers understand your offer faster.

benefits.title: Less enquiry chaos
benefits.desc: Forms and simple automations help collect customer details in one place instead of losing them across messages.

benefits.title: PL / ES / EN communication
benefits.desc: Useful for businesses in Spain that serve Polish, Spanish and international customers.

projectStatus.title: First we review the situation, then choose a concrete solution
projectStatus.description: Not every business needs a new website or a large system from the start. Sometimes it is enough to improve the Google profile, make WhatsApp contact easier, add a form or organise enquiries. That is why I start with a short review and a conversation.

steps.title: Show what you already have
steps.desc: You can send your website, Google profile, social media or a short description of the business.

steps.title: Pick the main problem
steps.desc: We check whether the biggest barrier is visibility, contact, forms, bookings or message chaos.

steps.title: Decide after that
steps.desc: If it makes sense, we can discuss a small, concrete improvement instead of forcing a large project.

projectStatus.note: At this stage, the most important thing is talking with local businesses and understanding practical needs. Paid work will be agreed individually once the formal details are clarified.

items.a: Yes. It is a short, free review of your website, Google profile or online presence. You will receive a few concrete suggestions with no obligation.

items.q: Is RafLab already an official business?
items.a: The project is currently in preparation and validation. I am talking with local businesses to understand which problems are worth solving first.
For small businesses, autónomos, local service providers, Polish businesses in Spain and companies that want to improve their website, Google, WhatsApp, forms or simple online booking.

items.q: Do I need to already have a website?
items.a: No. You can send a Google profile, Facebook, Instagram or a short description of the business. The mini-audit can start with what you already have.
We can communicate in Polish and English. Spanish content is prepared carefully and checked so it sounds clear and natural.
You receive concrete feedback. If it makes sense for both sides, we can later discuss a possible solution or estimate once the formal details are clarified.

services.title: Services
services.intro: We offer two pillars: AI Assistants and Websites & Apps. Every project follows a clear path from discovery to launch.

ai.title: AI Assistants
points: Automate repetitive work and support teams
Integrations with your tools (minimal in MVP)
Safe use of models – no sensitive data

web.title: Websites & Apps
points: i18n, dark mode and performance by default

steps.name: Discovery
steps.desc: Goals, scope and priorities. Align on KPIs and roadmap.

steps.name: Design
steps.desc: Sections, content, UI components. Polish a11y and SEO.

steps.name: Development
steps.desc: Implementation, i18n, animations, smoke tests and Lighthouse.

steps.name: Launch
steps.desc: Deploy to Vercel, monitoring and feedback-driven iterations.

contactPage.title: Send your website, Google profile or describe the problem
contactPage.description: You can tell me whether it is about the website, Google, WhatsApp, forms, bookings or automation. The best first step is a mini-audit.

contactForm.messageHint: You can paste a website link, Google profile, Facebook or Instagram and add a few lines about the business.
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: For example, a website or Google profile link and a short business description
